# Environment Reference

## Core n8n Variables

- DB_TYPE
- DB_POSTGRESDB_HOST
- DB_POSTGRESDB_PORT
- DB_POSTGRESDB_DATABASE
- DB_POSTGRESDB_USER
- DB_POSTGRESDB_PASSWORD
- N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY
- WEBHOOK_URL
- N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL

## Notes

- Do not store real secrets in this repository
- Only document variable names and their purpose
- Real values stay inside Railway
